src/dialog_border_tiles.c.reason: autobank — no longer needs pinning after state_manager moved to bank 0

src/hub_data.c.reason: bank-0 data, always mapped — no #pragma bank

src/loader.c.reason: NONBANKED VRAM loaders — only bank-0 code may call SWITCH_ROM

src/main.c.reason: game entry / VBL handling — no #pragma bank

src/music.c.reason: VBL ISR music_tick must be in HOME bank — no #pragma bank

src/music_data.c.reason: explicit pin — 11 KB data file; autobank would fill bank 1 to 100%

src/state_hub.c.reason: calls SET_BANK — must be HOME bank; no #pragma bank

src/state_manager.c.reason: state dispatch uses invoke(); must call SWITCH_ROM from bank 0

src/state_overmap.c.reason: calls SET_BANK — must be HOME bank; no #pragma bank

src/state_game_over.c.reason: autobank — state callback; invoke() in state_manager.c handles bank switching

src/state_playing.c.reason: autobank — state callback; invoke() in state_manager.c handles bank switching

src/state_title.c.reason: autobank — state callback; invoke() in state_manager.c handles bank switching
